text_block_list.name: Monólogo
text_block_list.text: One day, at the gym...

text_block_list.name: King Halo
text_block_list.text: One, two! One, two!

text_block_list.name: Kawakami Princess
text_block_list.text: One... Sigh...

text_block_list.name: Kawakami Princess
text_block_list.text: Two... Sigh...

text_block_list.name: King Halo
text_block_list.text: Can I have a word, Kawakami?

text_block_list.name: Kawakami Princess
text_block_list.text: Uh, s-sure!

text_block_list.name: King Halo
text_block_list.text: Your sighs keep throwing off my<n>concentration.

text_block_list.name: Kawakami Princess
text_block_list.text: I'm so sorry! I didn't mean to bother<n>you.

text_block_list.name: King Halo
text_block_list.text:
Look, just tell me what you're<n>sighing about.
You'll feel better if you<n>just let it out.

text_block_list.name: King Halo
text_block_list.text:
This first-rate Umamusume you so<n>admire can be
a first-rate therapist<n>too.

text_block_list.name: Kawakami Princess
text_block_list.text: Oh, King! Well, if you insist...

text_block_list.name: Kawakami Princess
text_block_list.text:
Recently, I feel like my shoulders<n>have been
getting bulkier. I don't feel<n>like a princess at all!

text_block_list.name: Kawakami Princess
text_block_list.text:
Toned is one thing, but I feel like I'm<n>completely
shredded! No prince is<n>going to want me now!

text_block_list.name: King Halo
text_block_list.text: Sigh... I know you can be shysometimes, but this really takes thecarrot cake.

text_block_list.name: King Halo
text_block_list.text: People come in all shapes and sizes.

text_block_list.name: King Halo
text_block_list.text:
Ask yourself why you're training<n>your shoulder
muscles. Why do you<n>want to be faster?

text_block_list.name: Kawakami Princess
text_block_list.text:
Because if I'm faster than everyone<n>else, my
prince will find me.

text_block_list.name: King Halo
text_block_list.text:
Exactly. Which is why those muscles<n>are proof
you are close to achieving<n>your dreams. It's
absurd to reject<n>them.

text_block_list.name: King Halo
text_block_list.text:
Didn't you come to this academy<n>because you
didn't want to be a<n>princess that just waits
around for<n>her prince?

text_block_list.name: Kawakami Princess
text_block_list.text: King... You're... completely right!

text_block_list.name: Kawakami Princess
text_block_list.text:
I'm going to lift this 150 kilogram<n>barbell right
now! Hnnngh. HAAAH!

text_block_list.name: King Halo
text_block_list.text: Now, that's real spunk.

text_block_list.name: King Halo
text_block_list.text: ...I can't let myself fall behind either.
